chapters.title: Chapter 601 - Throwing Dirt On Li Yunmu
chapters.body:
Chapter 601 - Throwing Dirt On Li Yunmu

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“Blade Master, because you’re an old powerhouse of Earth, I respect you.”

While saying that, Li Yunmu looked indifferently at the group of fluxers restricting Little Qing, and killing intent suddenly exploded from him.

With a single glance from him, the group of battle sages and domain sages didn’t try to act tough and one after another loosened their restrictions on Little Qing.

Upon recovering her freedom, Little Qing transformed into a cyan light and rushed toward Li Yunmu without the slightest hesitation. Her thirty meter long body continuously shrank and gradually twisted into another shape.

Clang!

A sharp and melodious blade sound could be heard, and a cyan divine blade formed completely. It was the first time it happened on Earth.

Comparing physical strength with Battle God and blade techniques with Blade Master?

What sort of arrogance was this!?

But at that moment, no one dared to say even half a word to Li Yunmu. After all, his combat strength was above all the supreme transcending experts of Earth!

Blade Master anxiously glanced at the other battlefield, but Dennis and his eleven Battle Angels had firmly locked Battle Sage Vega and Battle An Jing in battle. If they didn’t possess valiant combat prowess and strength surpassing that of the Battle Angels, they probably would have lost their lives long ago!

After taking a look at the helpless Battle Sages and Domain Sages as well, Blade Master sighed faintly.

Although the battle was really influential, not many people participated in it. Only the three supreme transcending experts and Li Yunmu were fighting hand to hand. The Battle Angels and Zhang Xianhu had showed up as well, but that was it.

The battles between top experts were always like this, just like when they launched an expedition against God Undercurrent. At that time, the enemy hadn’t cared about the losses. As long as he could firmly restrain the six supreme transcending experts, he was as good as invincible!

Regardless of how enormous their influence or how terrifying their wealth, as long as any ancient clan’s top experts perished and the future generations weren’t able to reach their heights, that clan would quickly decline. After all, any power’s foundation was its top experts!

Li Yunmu made a group of more than twenty battle sages to retreat with a roar. As for other low level existences, any of them who came forward were killed. Therefore, in a battle between two powers, as long as one side’s top experts were victorious, everything would be settled!

War God Shrine was already finished, so next it was time for Bladewood!

“You want battle? I will grant you your wish.”

Blade Master shook his head slightly, and with a single thought from him, the black blade controlling Zhang Xianhu withdrew and changed into a blade made of ordinary material.

The next second, flashy blade runes appeared one after another on Blade Master’s skin, and his presence began to rise quickly.

The instant Battle God left the battlefield and Li Yunmu clearly displayed his divine power, there was no longer anyone who was optimistic about the chances of the three transcending powers. Even if Blade Master and Battle Sage Vega had other trump cards in their hands, it was unlikely that they would change anything.

Regardless of how many trump cards they had, so what?

If Li Yunmu who cultivated divine power advanced toward them without caring for consequences, how likely would they be to win?

With all said and done, Li Yunmu was at a different level compared to the so-called supreme transcending experts. Even if his cultivation wasn’t at the very top, he could still crush the battle sages of Earth!

Li Yunmu lifted the cyan blade in his hand and gloomily said, “If you all hadn’t found trouble with me, I wouldn’t have found trouble with you either. Unfortunately, you were more greedy than I had imagined.”

Blade Master whose blade runes were emitting bright light spoke coldly as well. “The winner takes it all. Li Yunmu, the difference between you and me isn’t that great. If you aren’t greedy, then do you dare publicly reveal the method to reach deity realm?”

The instant Blade Master’s words were spoken, all the pairs of eyes on the battlefield fell on Li Yunmu.

Originally, they were frightened by Li Yunmu’s power and didn’t dare to covet after his knowledge. After all, even when three transcending powers joined hands, they were stopped outside Lucky Wind City, unable to advance forward.

But Blade Master’s words moved the hearts of most of the battle sages. Although they occupied the top ranks of the fifty-fifth earth, but given the present situation, they could not control themselves.

Among the experts in the limelight, almost all of them were from the parallel planes. Twelve humanoid figures with bat wings were restraining Battle Sage Vega and Battle Sage An Jing, and there was also the unheard of Zhang Xianhu who had forced Blade Master into a sorry state!

If even the supreme transcending experts who sat at the top were tempted this much, what could be said about the ordinary battle and domain sages?

Even if they followed their cultivation path to the end, they would only obtain a supreme transcending expert’s combat prowess and nothing more. When stunning experts from all sides came out of their hidden cultivation, what would these so-called supreme transcending experts be worth?

One after another, burning hot gazes fell upon Li Yunmu. With his keen senses, he immediately he was being pricked by needles. This sort of sensation made him extremely uncomfortable.

Li Yunmu turned his gaze onto each of the people below. Yet the battle and domain sages lowered their heads. None of them dared to meet eyes with Li Yunmu, let alone open their mouth and say what they were thinking.

After Li Yunmu surveyed his surroundings, a hint of pity appeared in his eyes, and he said with a slight smile, “Greed is the original sin. You all need to look at yourselves in the mirror. You want to obtain the method to turn into a deity, but none of you even dare to open your mouth.”

Li Yunmu then stepped forward. Almost like strolling in a park, he advanced toward Blade Master.

“Unfortunately, you won’t meet my gaze. As the troops of the so-called transcending powers, you are only sinister dogs. No, in my eyes, you all are even inferior to dogs. The supreme transcending experts wanted something from me, so they at least opened their mouths to talk, but what about you? Do you dare?”

Whilst clearly knowing that Blade Master was only inciting people, wanting the battle sages with wavering emotions to firm their hearts and attack together, Li Yunmu still opened his mouth to mock everyone present on the scene.

This wasn’t the smartest move, but it was the most suitable choice for him.

Even if Li Yunmu was more powerful, it would have been impossible for him to slaughter everyone. Blade Master’s move to throw mud at Li Yunmu while facing death could be considered as relatively successful.

chapters.title: Chapter 644 - Valkyrie Vs Goddess Of War And Wisdom
chapters.body:
Chapter 644 - Valkyrie Vs Goddess Of War And Wisdom

Chapter 644: Valkyrie VS Goddess of War and Wisdom

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Brunhilda’s appearance caused the morale of Scandinavia to swell, and the Scandinavian God Council excitedly cheered.

“Our valkyrie has appeared! Scandinavia’s hope has arrived.”

Brunhilda pulled back her long spear and pointed it at Zeus. “Your Heavenly Gods Council is being an intolerable bully! In the past, our Scandinavia and your Heavenly Gods Council never crossed paths, but not only did you dispatch Hades to attack my father, now you have come to disturb the peace of my Scandinavia. As a Valkyrie, I won’t allow you to infringe upon even an iota of Scandinavia!”

Brunhilda’s words resounded powerfully and caused the blood of Scandinavians to boil as if they had found their country’s only hope.

Zeus clenched his teeth and coldly said, “If you are willing to hand over the person who injured Hades, our Heavenly Gods Council won’t look into how Scandinavia was involved! Quickly, hand over that mortal to me!”

“Hmph! He is already my husband and a Scandinavian, so why should we hand him over to you?” Brunhilda said with a glare.

“So that mortal turns out to be a coward. After making a mistake, he can only hide behind another. Does he not even dare to accept responsibility? Furthermore, he still needs a woman to take the blame in his place?” Poseidon ridiculed.

Hearing someone ridiculing him, Li Yunmu leisurely appeared in front of Scandinavian God Council and Heavenly Gods Council.

“Hades was indeed injured by me. But I don’t remember how I did it. You injured Odin, and I injured Hates, which is completely fair. It would be better if you gave me face and handed over the secret genetic code. I would then be willing to forget this matter.

“What do you say? If you don’t agree to hand over the secret genetic code, it’s fine as well. Since I could wound Hades, then you Zeus aren’t worthy of entering my eyes either.”

After Li Yunmu finished speaking, he fell back a step. He couldn’t help but crease his eyebrows and furiously say inside his head, “You old bastard! Are you playing me again?”

Clearly, the words said to Zeus a moment ago did not belong to Li Yunmu. Although he had chosen to remain, he wasn’t willing to directly clash with the people of Heavenly Gods Council who were pushing forward with overbearing momentum.

He also wasn’t certain that he could defeat them. Thus, he had decided to watch the situation before actin. If he chose to fight, it would at best be by providing assistance to someone. He thus hadn’t expected that the system would use his mouth to say some reckless words.

Odin was stunned. He clearly remembered that the being residing in Li Yunmu’s body had said that they would proceed towards Whale City to steal the secret genetic code, so why were they still in Scandinavia? Could it be…

The thought moved Odin. Perhaps they were concerned about Scandinavia’s safety and had chosen to remain behind?

After all, there was a vast difference between the strength of Scandinavia and Heavenly Gods Council. If Brunhilda hadn’t awakened the enormous might of her long spear, they wouldn’t even have ability to resist.

All the gods of Scandinavian God Council were dumbstruck. Why was the mortal who had just recently joined Scandinavia being so savage? Moreover, he also said that he had injured Hades? All the gods sucked in a sharp breath; all of them were very clear about Hades’ strength.

If the mortal was able to heavily injure Hades, his strength was certainly impressive. No wonder Odin had allowed him to join Scandinavia—it seemed that he had cared about Li Yunmu’s strength from the start!

If he truly possessed such terrifying power, he would indeed be suitable for their Scandinavia’s valkyrie!

When the gods of Heavenly Gods Council heard Li Yunmu’s words, they were immediately enraged. Their gazes became increasingly more ruthless, for they felt as if their divine prestige was being trampled upon by a mortal. If it had been anyone else, then they would have been immediately torn limb from limb.

But the mortal in front of them wasn’t any ordinary mortal. He could injure Hades, so his strength couldn’t be underestimated!

A formidable pressure was immediately emitted from the furious Zeus who roared in anger. “Mortal! The only reason you can be so arrogant is because of that being in your body, right? Hmph, I will soon peel him away from your skin, then you won’t be any different from a normal mortal, unable to withstand even a single blow from me!”

Zeus then began to circulate the power inside his body, desiring to strike Li Yunmu. But Brunhilda used her long spear to bar the path in front of Li Yunmu.

“None of you should think of harming even a hair on my husband’s head!”

The long spear was thrust forward and released an enormous energy fluctuation which stunned the Heavenly Gods Council’s numerous gods.

When had her long spear become so formidable? The valkyrie didn’t possess such tyrannical strength previously!

With Brunhilda blocking the path to Li Yunmu, a god from Heavenly Gods Council’s stepped forward. She looked beautiful and had fair and glossy skin, tender red lips, which made her seem like an extremely gentle person.

“Father, let me fight her!”

Athena took the initiative, which settled Zeus’ anger for the time being, and he indifferently asked, “Are you certain?”

“How can I know without trying?”

Zeus was only afraid of the long spear in Brunhilda’s hand, which was still soaring in strength. If not for it, he wouldn’t need to be concerned about anything. But the long spear’s might left him anxious.

Athena was the goddess of war and wisdom in the Heavenly Gods Council. She was holding a sword and shield and had a gentle complexion, but her heart was full of killing intent.

And Brunhilda’s provocation just then had filled her with desire to battle the enemy.

The battle between Thor and Loki on Scandinavia’s side still hadn’t stopped, but the battle between Brunhilda and Athena, two goddesses, was on the verge of starting.

Li Yunmu was thinking of warning Brunhilda when the system used his mouth once again. [Zeus, what are you thinking about? Are you willing to hand over the secret genetic code? If you aren’t, then none of your Heavenly Gods Council should think about returning alive!]

After those words, Li Yunmu sensed his body suddenly being occupied.

Abominable! The damned system, what was it planning to do this time?

Gradually a ball of black qi appeared in his eyes. The system hadn’t forcefully occupied his body, but because of sensing great danger, it had automatically unleashed Li Yunmu’s most optimum battle state based on his current strength.

At that moment, without the assistance of the Dark State, Li Yunmu couldn’t even confront a half step god, let alone an ancient god.

And right then, all of the Heavenly Gods Council had arrived with their myriad of ancient gods. If Li Yunmu didn’t use the Dark State, wouldn’t he be beaten halfway to death by the enemy?

The system inwardly said, [Youngster, I have no other option but to defend us! This Zeus surprisingly desires to strip me from your body. I want to see whether he can do so or not!]

Li Yunmu had lost consciousness by then, and black qi covered his body from head to toe.

chapters.title: Chapter 645 - Ares’ Strength
chapters.body:
Chapter 645 - Ares’ Strength

Chapter 645: Ares’ Strength

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“Here we go again! My friend!” Odin said with shock-filled eyes.

Li Yunmu’s activation of the Dark State had caused the complexion of people of Heavenly Gods Council to change slightly, especially that of Zeus. He sensed that stripping that being from the mortal’s body was going to be extremely difficult. The youth’s strength had undergone a heaven-defying transformation.

How could striping the system from Li Yunmu’s body be easy?

Li Yunmu in the Dark State rushed to attack Zeus without any consciousness. The system had installed a target for attack, and it was Zeus!

Capture the leader to capture all the followers!

If he could defeat Zeus, then the Heavenly Gods Council’s gods would no longer dare to act impudently.

When Li Yunmu’s attack was about to hit Zeus, Ares used his pike to parry it. He clenched his teeth, finding it somewhat difficult.

Ares was forced to retreat because of Li Yunmu’s attack. While gasping for breath, he said to Zeus, “This was the reason he was able to resist Hades!”

Although a glimmer of astonishment flashed in Zeus’ gaze, it instantly changed into a glimmer of ruthlessness, and he roared at Ares, “Kill him for me! Such a dangerous person cannot be allowed to exist in the Origin World. Otherwise, he will continue giving us trouble and get in the way of our aim to rule the entire Origin World!”

After haring Zeus’ command, Ares was silent for a moment, then he indifferently said, “I fear that it will be somewhat difficult! This mortal’s power is like an abyss whose end can’t be seen at a glance.”

Zeus’ complexion changed suddenly. Even the most powerful of Heavenly Gods Council Ares also surprisingly said such words? The level of Li Yunmu’s strength was clear from this.

Ares was also quite uncertain in his heart regarding this. If he truly attacked the Li Yunmu at that moment, he wasn’t certain if he could even take ten moves.

Ares’ entire battle intent and strength congealed in his long pike. He hoped to use all of his strength in one attack, hoping to kill Li Yunmu with it. Otherwise, he would be unable to resist the counterattack.

Zeus’ gaze then fell on Apollo and Artemis, and he furiously bellowed, “You two, assist him! I don’t believe that this mortal cannot die!”

Before he even finished speaking, the light of the sun and the moon descended, shining between him and Ares. Ares’ long pike turned into an afterimage and rose into the sky above. It had all of Ares’ battle intent and power condensed in it as well as the assistance of Artemis. The next moment, it suddenly descended from the sky filled with the splendor of the sun and the moon.

Its terrifying power was congealed from the full strength of three gods. Such a deadly attack, how could Li Yunmu resist it with the body of a mortal? At that instant, Zeus was completely certain of winning!

“Mortal! This is the punishment for fighting against me! If you hadn’t been so unbridled, then perhaps you wouldn’t have received the divine punishment!”

The three ancient gods released their power together, which stunned the Scandinavian God Council. This time, everything bode ill for the mortal.

Odin’s eyes also opened widely when he saw the power falling from the sky directly at Li Yunmu’s head. It was the divine punishment coming from the fury of the gods!

“My friend!”

Odin wasn’t anxious about Li Yunmu rather that being inside his body. But even if he acted at that moment, it would be too late.

Li Yunmu was too far from him, so he wouldn’t be able to block that attack.

“Elder brother, the mortal won’t be able to survive this attack!” Poseidon excitedly said to Zeus.

The two gods standing behind him, Dionysus and Hephaestus, also appeared to be somewhat relaxed. They knew that with Artemis and Apollo joining hands with Ares, the mortal would stand no chance.

Li Yunmu in his Dark State was completely unable to determine the strength of the divine attack about to strike his head. He only felt his body suddenly being suppressed, after which the afterimage of the long pike swallowed him.

The snow in the Land of Ice trembled, and the ice covering the ground began to crack, even forming an enormous ravine.

Everyone without exception was shocked by the terrifying power, and the gods of the Scandinavian God Council felt great pity for the mortal. Dying under the hands of three gods joining hands wasn’t any injustice toward him.

Brunhilda flung her long spear forward, and Athena was instantly blown away. She hoarsely shouted, “Li YUNMU!”

It was the first time that Brunhilda had called out Li Yunmu’s name. Previously due to the divine prestige of her station, she had called him a mortal. But at that moment, she already viewed him on the same level as all the gods of Scandinavia.

Although Athena was pushed back, she struck with her sword toward Brunhilda, which she blocked with her long spear.

Yet she didn’t want to continue the battle before confirming whether Li Yunmu was alive or not.

“Li Yunmu!”

She didn’t dare to believe that he would sacrifice his life for Scandinavia, but she was unable to accept the reality either.

She knew that even her father would be unable to block the attack congealed by the three ancient gods, so how could he, a mortal with a mortal body, be able to resist it?

Tears began to fall from Brunhilda’s eyes, landing on the long spear. It seemed to sense its master’s intense love as well as extreme fury!

The long spear’s power soared, and it continuously flickered with light as it became much more formidable in Brunhilda’s hand.

“Li Yunmu…”

Brunhilda, who had always been like a masculine woman, dropped bitter tears on her weapon.

“You all, will certainly die!”

A golden light suddenly appeared in Brunhilda’s gaze, which was the power she had awakened with the long spear. It left the Heavenly Gods Council and Scandinavian God Council dumbstruck!

Was that the final state unleashed after complete comprehension of the godly pike?

Odin was stupefied. The most formidable strength is the world was the power of love. It could destroy all obstructions and difficulties and pressure everyone around.

Zeus was startled while Poseidon was stupefied. They could clearly sense that Brunhilda’s power could be considered to be heaven-defying!

A hint of anger appeared in Brunhilda’s gaze, and she roared, “I will take revenge! None of you should hope of running away! I’ll kill all of you!”

While swinging her long spear, she fiercely rushed at Athena. At that moment, the goddess of war and wisdom was far from being her opponent. She promptly raised her golden shield to resist, but as soon as it touched the long spear, it was cleaved in two!

Athena’s eyes were filled with endless astonishment, following which she was blown away by the godly spear.

Whoosh!

Li Yunmu’s silhouette appeared in front of all the gods from within the smoke!

chapters.title: Chapter 646 - Closed Eyes And Open Eyes
chapters.body:
Chapter 646 - Closed Eyes And Open Eyes

Chapter 646: Closed Eyes and Open Eyes

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“City lord!”

The supreme transcending level experts were still urging Lin Yuerou, but since had made her decision, no one could change her mind!

She took out the long sword hanging at her waist and rushed toward the senior blocking the bridge. She constantly waved her long sword which transformed into a few aftermirages as she poured all her battle intent and focus into her weapon.

Although she was unable to shake up the senior, at least she also wouldn’t be hit by him and lose complete superiority.

Whoosh, whoosh, whoosh!

A few sword shadows flitted past the elder’s body, but he did not try to evade in the slightest. Instead he nimbly moved his hands to constantly clash with the long sword, even causing sparks to fly.

With his eyes still closed, the senior slammed his fist against the bridge. Although its stunning power wasn’t sufficient to cause the bridge to collapse, it was enough to destabilize Lin Yuerou.

Just as she was thinking of stabilizing herself, another fierce tremor ran through the bridge. She lost balance, and cold sweat began to pour down her forehead as her body tottere on the verge of collapse!

If she fell into the magma or ice hell underneath, she would definitely die a horrible death!

Lin Yuerou promptly jumped into the sky so the shaking of the bridge would have no relation to her.

While the supreme transcending level experts were in cold sweat from seeing her about to fall off the bridge, she withdrew and took a deep breath. The senior with his eyes still closed also stopped moving at that moment.

“City lord, did you discove anything?”

Lin Yuerou shook her head and said, “While battling him, I was trying to test whether I can stop him from attacking me. I understand one thing clearly now, and that is that he won’t take the initiative to attack. But as long as we enter his attack range, he will certainly attack.”

The supreme transcending level experts couldn’t help but exclaim in astonishment, “What exactly is this person thinking? Why doesn’t he take the initiative to attack?”

Lin Yuerou shook her head, then lifted her sword to rush towards the senior once more. If they were unable to get past him, they wouldn’t be able to pass this layer.

What did Illusion God’s words mean? Every layer was a different sort of test, so what exactly did this layer test?

Why did they need to fight one by one?

Because the bridge was truly narrow, if they wanted to pass, they could only pass one by one, and they also couldn’t join hands to defeat the old man. After all, if they were even the slightest bit careless, it was highly possible that they would drop into the magma or ice hell.

“What should we do exactly? How do we clear this layer?”

The Illusion God was still busy playing chess. He caressed his beard and laughed to himself.

“Girl, have you encountered difficulty in this layer? Not everyone has good luck. Previously, your luck had been good, but you won’t be able to pass this layer.”

Lin Yuerou’s fight with the senior ended exactly the same, without the slightest change.

“This old man seems to be extremely familiar with each of our offensive styles. He has already memorized our attacks, so even if we continue fighting him, we won’t be able to win.”

All of the supreme transcending level experts were anxious.

“Then are we truly trapped here? What happens if Lucky Wind City is attacked from all sides while we are stuck here. Without our support, the city would be in great peril.”

Lin Yuerou was also very anxious, but she couldn’t do anything. She had to clear this layer, for only then could they advance to the next one.

Since she had chosen to enter this mythical realm, she couldn’t regret her choice!

“He should be the legendary Acala, so defeating him is extremely difficult. He won’t take the initiative to attack, and all his attacks are defensive in nature. Destroying this sort of indestructible defense is extremely difficult!”

“Then why don’t we attack him together? Even if he is extremely powerful, he can only react to one person’s attack. If so many of us attack together, he won’t have the time to defend against each of our attacks?”

“But what about the surrounding ice and magma hells? What if we fell down…”

“Our goal right now is to overpower this Acala, so even if there are some sacrifices, we have to be willing to accept that. City lord, gives us the command, and we will attack together!”

Lin Yuerou was somewhat hesitant. What sort of test was it exactly? Unity? Coordination?

Her eyes shone fiercely, and her lips bent to form an arc!

So this layer can be broken like this!

“I have already discovered this Acala’s weakness!” Lin Yuerou said with a slight smile.

Hearing her words that Acala had some weakness, the supreme transcending level experts were astonished. Were her words true? Had she really found a way to defeat Acala?

“This bridge can only hold one person, so we should arrange ourselves in a row. We should attack this Acala once and retreat, which would cause his memory to be in disorder. Then, we will find the opportunity to defeat him. If we went one by one to fight against him, he would unleash the defense based on memory of our attacks, and none of us would be able to defeat him!”

Upon hearing Lin Yuerou’s words, the eyes of the supreme transcending level experts shone brightly. If they could defeat Acala without losing anyone from their squad, it would of course be the best!

After that, all the supreme transcending experts arranged themselves on the bridge. Then, one of them attacked the Acala once and retreated while the second person took his position.

Sure enough, as Lin Yuerou had said, Acala’s memory defense was broken by this strategy. Because of the chaos in his mind, Acala was unable to defend properly.

The Illusion God was slightly startled. “This girl, she could even discover this weakness. It was truly not simple.”

He took a deep breath. “Seems like I have to make this Acala use his ultimate trick.”

The supreme transcending level experts thought that Acala had already been defeated by them. Who could have expected, however, that he would suddenly open his eyes and send the supreme transcending level experts flying away.

The eyes of the supreme transcending level experts filled with astonishment. Wasn’t Acala only supposed to defend and not attack?

Lin Yuerou was also startled. This was her negligence; she had forgotten that Acala’s eyes had been closed until then. She should have expected that when he opened his eyes, his formidable might would definitely become more powerful.

The formation of the supreme transcending level experts was broken. Lin Yuerou tightly clenched her fists and said while gnashing her teeth, “I always felt that the Illusion God was scheming. How should this open-eyed Acala be dealt with?”

Illusion God began to laugh heartily.”Girl, have you exhausted your abilities? This should be considered my win. If you remain in the mythical realm, it should be quite interesting. Maybe you can help me create a stronger mythical realm.”

chapters.title: Chapter 647 - Counterattack
chapters.body:
Chapter 647 - Counterattack

Chapter 647: Counterattack

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

All the gods were stunned!

Li Yunmu was surprisingly still alive!

How could he act like nothing had happened after blocking Ares, who was a War God, attack? It was impossible! Wasn’t it an illusion?

Zeus and Poseidon were dumbstruck. How could the power congealed by three gods have no effect on the mortal? What exactly was going on there?

The smoke gradually dissipated, and Li Yunmu’s body, which had been hidden by it, finally appeared in front of everyone. There was still the same strange smile on his face, but a golden armor now covered his body.

Could that golden armor have saved him? He looked like hell’s emissary at that moment.

War God Ares, Sun God Apollo, and Moon Goddess Artemis were startled. They could not understand how the mortal could perfectly block an attack which contained the combined strength of the three of them.

Unless, he was truly the devil from hell!

Only devils could possibly draw a tie against gods. Moreover, the strength of devils was certainly on a higher level compared to gods!

Brunhilda looked at Li Yunmu, who seemed to have come from hell, and instantly the tears in her eyes stopped. As long as nothing happened to Li Yunmu, then regardless of whatever appearance he had, she would be extremely happy.

The Dark State wasn’t Li Yunmu’s original appearance, and it had appeared only after the system had occupied his consciousness!

Brunhilda’s gaze turned extremely ruthless, and she glowered at Athena

“You aren’t my opponent! Let your father Zeus battle with me!” she bellowed.

Athena, who had been blown far away, was gasping for breath. In terms of brute force, she was naturally not as robust as the valkyrie. But in terms of wisdom, she was even known as the Goddess of War and Wisdom, so naturally she could defeat Brunhilda in strategy and tactics.

“Good… You can defeat me, but isn’t that all because of the long spear in your hand? Can you let me take a look at it?”

Athena looked at Brunhilda’s dazzling long spear, and a cunning expression appeared on her face.

Brunhilda coldly snorted. “I am afraid that you won’t be able to receive it!”

She threw the long spear at Athena and suspended it in the air. But regardless of how much power Athena used, she was unable to shake the long spear.

She took a deep breath, and at that moment she realized that all scandinavian weapons recognized their master. If someone else other than their master tried to wield them, it would be extremely difficult!

Thor’s Mjolnir was also the same! Only he could lift his hammer while others were unable to hold it.

On the other side, Thor was using Mjollnir to beat Loki until he spat blood. At that moment, Loki was forcefully brought in front of Odin.

“Ha ha ha ha…”

Blood trickled down from Loki’s mouth. He was constantly howling with laughter at Odin.

“You aren’t suited to be Scandinavia’s king! I should be the king of Scandinavia. I would lead it to conquer this world instead of constantly defending this corner like you!” he shrieked.

Hearing the discontent in Loki’s voice, Odin’s slapped his face, almost blowing him away.

He again spat out blood and fell on the ground. He looked at Odin’s dignified complexion, but he was still unconvinced.

Why was he being punished? Wasn’t he also thinking about Scandinavia’s future?

“If thou were suitable to be the king, why would you push Scandinavia into battle? Is this the so-called way of the king?

“Thou aren’t even suitable to be a Scandinavian. Your betrayed your motherland, betrayed your family, thou have truly shamed Scandinavia.”

Odin’s words were like a stab of a knife in Loki’s heart, and he gnashed his teeth. “So what if I betrayed them? All of this was to replace an incompetant king like you!”

“Shut your mouth!” Thor also slapped Loki and then said, “Can’t you see? Sister and that mortal who has already become Scandinavia’s son-in-law, all of them are fighting. And what about you? Without even contributing anything to Scandinavia, you are simply unsatisfied with father’s rule.”

Loki was rendered unconscious by the slaps. All the gods of Scandinavia were looking furiously at him, clearly hating the traitor.

In their eyes, the mortal who had married Brunhilda was much more worthy of their respect. He was battling with the Heavenly Gods Council to protect Scandinavia and had even blocked the combined attack of three gods. When he possessed such terrifying strength, how could they not respect and admire him?

If Scandinavia somehow survived that catastrophe, Odin would definitely allow Li Yunmu to enter the ranks of gods.

When War God Ares saw Li Yunmu gradually advance in his direction, his complexion instantly changed. He had used his entire strength in the attack just then, and the devil was surprisingly still unhurt. Now even if he used some tricks, wouldn’t they all be easily ignored?

Apollo and Artemis retreated; it was clear that they could also sense the slow approaching danger. When Zeus and Poseidon saw the three gods backing together, they had to act personally.

Zeus’ blue eyes suddenly turned completely vacant and thunderous clouds began to surge in the sky. Countless thunderbolts descended from the sky on Li Yunmu.

On the other side, the Emperor of Sea Poseidon converted the surrounding ice and snow into a tsunami that surged forth at the youth.

Two powerful ancient gods of the Heavenly Gods Council attacked like the hot wind of hell. But Li Yunmu seemed to have lost his soul, and his complexion was chilling.

He didn’t feel intimidated in the slightest in front of the powerful attacks of the two ancient gods. His body gradually hid in the darkness while the cyan divine blade in his hand turned into countless afterimages. His black pupils were completely swallowed by darkness.

[Warning! The Dark State will only last for five more minutes. Requesting host to finish the battle quickly!]

Li Yunmu remained aloof after hearing the system’s warning and crazily howled with laughter.

“All of you die for me! Drop dead! Dark Quantum Explosion Strike!”

This was the only skill he could use after activating the Dark State. Heaven and earth suddenly changed and were completely covered by darkness, just like when he had fought with the King of Hell Hades and had absorbed most of Hades’ strength.

At that moment, the entire world turned completely dark!

The afterimages of the cyan divine blade were also covered by a layer of black qi. With this formidable strength of the Dark State, even if the opponent was an ancient god, they were similar to ants in front of Li Yunmu.

Boom!

The afterimages turned into waves of darkness that rushed toward the thunderbolts descending from the sky and the tsunami charging at him from the ground. Upon impact, all of them were instantly dissolved.

chapters.title: Chapter 648 - Second Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 648 - Second Plan

Chapter 648: Second Plan

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Li Yunmu had lost himself in the Dark State, and like a crazy devil, he started attacking the two ancient god level powerhouses.

His body erupted with formidable power and created countless aftermirages, which rotated around the two ancient gods. Gradually, he swallowed them into the dark space.

Zeus and Poseidon had never eaten such a big loss!

The trident in Poseidon’s hand became unstable, and he said to Zeus while shivering from head to toe, “He… has absorbed Hades’ strength!”

When comparing proficiency with the dark attribute, Li Yunmu was clearly more formidable than Hades. Therefore, him having absorbed Hades’ strength was quite reasonable.

When he had dealt with Hades, his strength was already formidable. But at that moment, after having absorbing Hades’ power, he had become even more powerful.

A wave of dark energy fluctuation could be seen in the sky. It was constantly spreading, and the Heavenly Gods Council was blown away by it.

Heavenly Gods Council was endlessly surprised. How terrifying was the mortal’s strength? How could he force the entire Heavenly Gods Council to retreat by himself?

Before Athena was able to reach the long spear, she was forced back a great distance by Li Yunmu’s energy fluctuation.

As Brunhilda promptly retrieved her long spear, she also sensed the Land of Ice being flipped over by Li Yunmu in his Dark State.

At that moment, he raised the divine cyan blade and suddenly struck toward Zeus and Poseidon without caring for the shocked expressions of the others.

The system’s reminder reached him then. [The time for the Dark State has concluded!]

The dark qi enveloping Li Yunmu’s body quickly dissipated, and the dark space made by him just a moment ago shattered instantly.

Li Yunmu’s body gently fell to the ground with the divine cyan blade landing by his side.

The panicked Zeus and Poseidon were both shocked. Could it be that the devil had left his body?

But after Li Yunmu’s rampage, the majority of Heavenly Gods Council had suffered injuries. If they clashed with the Scandinavian God Council at such a state, they would definitely suffer a loss.

Zeus looked at the fainted Li Yunmu and promptly stated, “We will leave… Scandinavia, but don’t think that we have given up. From this day onwards, Heavenly Gods Council and Scandinavia cannot exist under the same sky!”

With the clouds and mist, Zeus’s Heavenly Gods Council disappeared from the Northern Land of Ice.

The Scandinavian God Council relaxed. The people of Heavenly Gods Council had left after being snubbed.

When Loki, who was gasping for breath while lying on the ground, discovered that the Heavenly Gods Council couldn’t even defeat a mortal, he couldn’t help but feel regret over his stupid choice.

He had never expected that his sister’s mortal husband was formidable to the extent of raising anyone’s hackles!

Even his father Odin might not possess the ability to force the Heavenly Gods Council to retreat, but Li Yunmu had accomplished that.

The Scandinavian Gods Council considered Li Yunmu as Scandinavia’s hero, but Odin was completely clear in his heart that all this was closely related to the being residing in the mortal’s body.

Fortunately, their Scandinavia possessed such a trump card; otherwise, they would’ve been exterminated.

Brunhilda quickly supported Li Yunmu up. This time, he would probably hibernate for a long time. As his wife, it was her responsibility to look after him until he awakened.

The system inside Li Yunmu’s body sighed.

[So this youngster still made this choice! I don’t know whether he is a fool or what? Fortunately I had a plan B, or else we would’ve definitely been conned by this youngster.]

At this time, Sleipnir returned to Scandianavia, holding something in his mouth.

He came in front of unconscious Li Yunmu and respectfully said, “Lord, the matter you entrusted to me has been accomplished successful! This is the object you wanted!”

Brundhilda was slightly startled. “Sleipnir? You assisted this being in handling something!”

“Yes! Madam valkyrie. Since the mortal decided to fight together with Scandinavia, Lord instructed me to do this matter.”

Brunhilda was some gratified. She also hadn’t expected for Li Yunmu to suddenly stand on Scandinavia’s side. Actually, he still wasn’t formally accepted as a member of Scandinavia, but not only had he willingly staked his life, he had also become everyone’s hero.

Even she as a valkyrie also felt inferior to him!

The system looked at the secret genetic code and said with a faint smile, [This toy has finally returned to its original owner. Now I can rule the entire Origin World at ease. Girl, help me hide it carefully. Until this youngster awakens, don’t show it to anyone.]

Although Brunhilda didn’t know the meaning behind the system’s words, she still followed its instructions and hid the box with the secret genetic code.

“Li Yunmu, he… When will he awaken?”

[Why? Are you so impatient about finishing the wedding with him?] the system teased her.

Brunhilda’s face flushed red. She inserted her long spear into the ground and coldly said, “I am a grand valkyrie, and being married to me is his good fortune. Now can you awaken him a little sooner?”

The system shook its head. [I am afraid that it’s impossible. This time, he used much more strength compared to last time, so his recovery will also be slower than before.]

Disappointment surfaced on Brunhilda’s face. She looked at the unconscious Li Yunmu and couldn’t help but shake her head and sigh.

…

After the Heavenly Gods Council returned to Whale City, most of them still had a shadow of Li Yunmu in their hearts. They had used their full strength to return quickly, away from that excessively tyrannical young mortal.

They hadn’t expected him to be so powerful, which made them feel helpless. No one in the Heavenly Gods Council could battle him, so as long as Scandinavia had him, other powers of the Origin World wouldn’t dare to provoke it.

Zeus’s gaze was turned somewhat dim. Not only did the resentment for Hades being injured hadn’t been eliminated, but the Heavenly Gods Council had suffered even more injuries. It was the first time their ancient god level powerhouses faced such a powerful enemy.

Hades hadn’t awakened yet and was still lying unconscious.

At this time, Dionysus suddenly rushed to Zeus. “Not good! King, the secret genetic code box was stolen by someone!”

“What? Who was it?”

Zeus suddenly stood up from the king’s seat. Who would have thought that after the Whale City went out with full force, someone would take the opportunity of them being away to steal inside.

“I don’t know… Hades still hasn’t awakened. The mortals of Whale City have been negligent in protecting the city and thus someone was able to intrude! What should we do now?”

Zeus was furious. “The secret genetic code is the key to ruling the Origin World! Bastard, regardless of whoever you are, you will return it to me!”

chapters.title: Chapter 649 - Weak Point
chapters.body:
Chapter 649 - Weak Point

Chapter 649: Weak Point

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Acala, after opening his eyes, was completely different from when his eyes were closed.

The close-eyed Acala only defended and wouldn’t attack. But after opening his eyes, instead of defending, he only focused on attacking!

In the first round against him, all the supreme transcending experts were forced back by his fierce offensive.

They sunk into desperate straits. Their physical strength consumption had become extremely grave. If Lin Yuerou couldn’t find a way to break the deadlock, they could only stake it all, but given their weary condition, they were more than likely to make a mistake.

Pea-sized drops of cold sweat were pouring down Lin Yuerou’s forehead. The supreme transcending experts were trying their hardest, but they seemed to have encountered an insurmountable wall in the fourth layer of the mythical realm, like encountering a bottleneck in cultivation.

Illusion God indifferently smiled and persuaded Lin Yuerou, “Girl, you can still choose to abandon this quest! It is impossible for you to clear this fourth layer of the mythical realm. No one had even been able to reach it, so all of you seeing it can already be considered terrific. You don’t need to struggle! Obediently become my servants in this mythical realm!”

Lin Yuerou was still heavily perspiring, but she couldn’t find any weakness in Acala’s offensive!

Trying to create disorder in its defense was very easy, but breaking his assault was extremely difficult. The defending party was always passive because they kept guessing about what trick would the attacker use next. But the attacker was always the one taking initiative, so it was quite impossible to break the attacker’s rhythm by relying on defense alone.

The supreme transcending level experts had toppled on the ground after exhausting their strength. Looking at the indestructible Acala, their morale had been completely crushed, and they were about to give into despair.

Lin Yuerou raised the sword in her hand and thought to herself, Seems like I will have to break Acala’s offensive by myself!

When Acala had its eyes closed, he appeared to be very heavy. But as soon as he opened his eyes, he became extremely nimble, using tricks that made him basically impossible to defeat.

Lin Yuerou suddenly thought of the cultivation method Li Yunmu had imparted to her. There was a particular path in it which she had been unable to train regardless of how hard she tried. She felt that it was because her cultivation wasn’t sufficient, but it now seemed that she had been stuck at a bottleneck.

The method to breakthrough had been taught to her by Li Yunmu previously, and he said that she should enter dire straits.

Thus, she began to clash with Acala again and again. She was repeatedly forced back while continuously spitting out blood.

The supreme transcending level experts, who had fallen on the ground, saw Lin Yuerou stake her life and were completely astonished.

“City lord! You must be careful!”

Lin Yuerou didn’t hear their advice, since her complete focus was on defending against Acala’s offense. In the end though, she was almost blown away from the bridge by a punch.

If she fell into the magma or ice hell, she would definitely die a horrible death!

“I finally know how to defeat you!”

A fierce light shone in Lin Yuerou’s eyes. At that moment, Acala stopped his attack while the supreme transcending level experts looked at each other in excitement.

She had so quickly discovered the method to break this layer? She was worthy of being their city lord! Their belief in her wasn’t misplaced! If she was with them, then regardless of how difficult the situation was, nothing would be impossible to survive.

Lin Yuerou took a deep breath and sensed the energy continuously bubbling forth from her dantian. She knew that because of the dire straits, she had finally broken through the bottleneck.

The strength of her sword rapidly increased. As long as her attack hit, Acala would completely disappear from the mythical realm.

Who knew whether he had also been turned into a servant of the mythical realm after entering?

Illusion God twirled his beard and looked at the scene in the mythical realm. He felt that Lin Yuerou was only putting up a brave front.

She was unable to continue battling, so what trick could she pull off now?

Illusion God turned his back and said with a slight smile, “Seems like it’s finished!”

Indeed, it was finished, since the sword in Lin Yuerou’s hand had already impaled Acala. The long sword had pierced his waist.

Acala, who had always been like an unbroken diamond, had actually been impaled!

All the supreme transcending level experts were dumbstruck. They heard Acala’s muffled groan, followed by a ‘boom’ sound of an explosion. The entire mythical realm seemed to be on the verge of collapse.

The Illusion God was shell-shocked and couldn’t help but say in astonishment, “She… surprisingly discovered Acala’s weak point?”

Lin Yuerou had noticed long ago that Acala always relied on turning at the waist to produce formidable might. His defense also relied almost entirely upon his waist.

Therefore, when he switched from defense to offense, he overlooked the defense of his waist. This was Acala’s weak point.

Lin Yuerou pulled back the sword and cupped her first in the other hand. “Senior, thanks for letting me win! Now, can you allow us to advance to the fifth layer?”

Illusion God was still silent from his astonishment. After hearing Lin Yuerou’s words, he finally managed to react. He took a deep breath and said, “Truly unexpected. You, girl, can enter the fifth layer! Girl, you will be the first person the enter the fifth layer of my mythical realm.”

“Each layer of this mythical layer contains a different test. The fourth layer was the test of unity and solidarity, right?”

Illusion God burst out laughing heartily. “You have certainly not disappointed me! I hope you can show such performance in the fifth layer as well! But I want to change the condition of our bet for the fifth layer.”

“What do you mean?”

Lin Yuerou couldn’t help but knit her brows. Didn’t this mean that Illusion God didn’t mean to keep his promise? What if he intended to keep them trapped inside the mythical realm instead of allowing them to leave?

“I wish for you to enter final layer alone. Others cannot go with you. If you can clear the fifth layer, I will release you all of you and also give you a treasure. If you are unable to clear the fifth layer of my mythical realm, you will all lose and have to stay inside my mythical realm!”

Lin Yuerou hesitated after hearing the condition. She couldn’t involve others in her gamble.

“I am not willing. You have to release others. If you want to penalize anyone, then punish me alone!”

chapters.title: Chapter 650 - The Final Test
chapters.body:
Chapter 650 - The Final Test

Chapter 650: The Final Test

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

When Lin Yuerou took the initiative to bear all responsibility, the Illusion God could detect a hint of resoluteness in her gaze. Wasn’t this the reason she was able to receive everyone’s respect in Lucky Wind City so quickly?

“City lord! It doesn’t matter! We believe you!”

The supreme transcending level experts entrusted everything to Lin Yuerou. They had experienced all sorts of life or death battles in the mythical realm and were like locusts tied to one rope. Regardless of whatever the conclusion was, they were all delighted to share it.

“City lord, you don’t need to feel pressured! It really doesn’t matter. You just need to focus your attention on clearing the mythical realm without caring about us!”

Upon hearing the words of all the supreme transcending level experts, Lin Yuerou suddenly felt quite uncomfortable. Her gaze flickered left and right. With everyone trusting her to this extent, she naturally couldn’t fail to live up to their expectations.

“Girl, I am sorry to inform you, but only one person can enter the fifth layer, so only you can enter the fifth layer as the representative of your people. If you cannot pass it, then I will keep all of you in the mythical realm as servants! This has been a regulation for a long time.”

Lin Yuerou was a very responsible person. The Illusion God could see that, but the mythical realm had its own rules, and he definitely couldn’t break them.

Lin Yuerou took a deep breath after hearing that. Since the Illusion God had said so much, what could she say to counter it? If he said that only one person could enter, then she would become everyone’s hope to leave the mythical realm.

“Alright! But I still request that if I don’t clear the mythical realm that you only penalize me. I will agree to any of your requests, but I want you to release them!”

After hearing Lin Yuerou still speaking in their support, the supreme transcending level experts were extremely moved. Apart from Li Yunmu, no one had treated them so well.

The Illusion God saw Lin Yuerou persistence and couldn’t help but exclaim, “Girl, why are you bothering with them? If you remain inside the mythical realm, I will naturally be very excited, but I would still hate to part with such fine servants.”

“If you aren’t willing then I won’t enter the fifth layer! In any case, since I have already cleared the first four layers, then even if I don’t continue to the fifth layer, you cannot regard this as me leaving the mythical realm midway. You cannot keep us trapped here as servants!”Lin Yuerou indifferently said/

The Illusion God sighed and said while waving his hand, “Alright, alright! If you really care so much about them, I will agree with you. But you also said just now that you would agree to any of my requests.”

The malicious gaze of the Illusion God aimed at Lin Yuerou sent an involuntarily quiver up her body. The Illusion God was so old… He-he shouldn’t have any unique desires, right?

Lin Yuerou suddenly began to slightly regret promising the old man a request. But her words had always been worth nine sacred tripods. Since she had already said it, she would naturally follow through.

She promptly said, “Senior, I still haven’t charged into the fifth layer. Don’t you think that it is a little premature to make your request?”

The Illusion God began to laugh heartily and said, “You are quite right. Then I invite you to enter the fifth layer. The first four layers weren’t difficult, but the fifth one contains the essence of this mythical realm. Even this old man was unable to clear the fifth layer, which is the reason I became the Illusion God.

“Girl, if you can clear the fifth layer, then this old man will kowtow to you. In the future, if you want anything from me, I will definitely appear. Naturally, I will also send you off with a gift!”

Based on the Illusion God’s excited appearance, Lin Yuerou didn’t know whether he hoped for her to not clear the fifth layer or to clear it…

In the end, she nodded and said, “Begin! I am already prepared, so senior, do not disappoint me!”

The Illusion God waved his hands,and Lin Yuerou disappeared from the fourth realm. This caused the supreme transcending level experts who had come with her to become nervous. If their city lord truly couldn’t clear the fifth layer, she would be eternally trapped in the mythical realm.

Then who would Lucky Wind City rely upon to protect itself? Without Lin Yuerou, it would be in a perilous situation.

If Ling Shuang had been around, it would still have been alright. But unfortunately, that stubborn woman had chosen to pursue her own goal in the end.

The Illusion God couldn’t help but mutter while playing chess with himself, “I hope that this girl won’t disappoint me! Otherwise, she will be the same as me, playing chess here alone! But seeing her performance in the last four layers, she shouldn’t disappoint me.”

Lin Yuerou gradually opened her eyes and found herself in a place which resembled the first layer. Endless darkness covered the entire region like a sealed black space.

She faintly knitted her eyebrows and couldn’t help but speak out:

“Don’t tell me that this is the fifth layer which Illusion God was speaking about? But there’s nothing in here!”

She constantly enquired:

“Senior, is this the fifth layer?”

But she didn’t obtain any reply. She seemed to have been transported to a sealed space. The first four layers had tested a specific virtue, but in the fifth layer, apart from the endless darkness, there was nothing around. Could it be a hint?

Lin Yuerou tested the same method which she had used to clear the first layer and tried to illuminate the dark space. But after testing it a few times, she gave up on that idea.

That was because there was absolutely no relation between the first layer and the fifth layer. For the time being, she still couldn’t understand what exactly was the significance of the dark space.

Lin Yuerou pondered about the few clues provided by the Illusion God. He had said that he was unable to clear the fifth layer, which meant that it didn’t have any flaws. It was a perfect mythical realm.

But Lin Yuerou did not believe that the world had any perfect stuff. In her mind, all entities possessed weak points and flaws.

“There is certainly a way to escape this place!” Lin Yuerou cheered herself in her heart.

Then, she began to carefully investigate the surrounding environment. The endless darkness was like an abyss whose end couldn’t be seen.

Lin Yuerou felt like she was looking at the center of it. When she was gazing at the abyss, the abyss was also gazing at her.

The feeling she had was that everything seemed to have been swallowed by the darkness.

And she felt a hint of fear toward it, like she was being completely stifled by it. Perhaps this was the reason why humans disliked darkness.

chapters.title: Chapter 696 - The Snake Of Yamata River
chapters.body:
Chapter 696 - The Snake Of Yamata River

Chapter 696: The Snake of Yamata River

“These islanders are too pitiful! How about you help them?”

Li Yunmu almost spat on the ground. When did Miss An’s temperament change? Was she not the female devil of the Underworld Serpent who didn’t hesitate to use any means to accomplish her goals regardless of how vicious it was? When did she turn into such a good-natured woman?

“Haven’t you always been a villain? How come you suddenly want to help others?”

“I cannot erase my past actions, but can’t I turn over a new leaf?” Miss An snorted then added, “They all consider this Miss a god, so for this title, this Miss has to do something, doesn’t she? Otherwise won’t everyone feel that our title as gods isn’t as reputed as it appears?”

Li Yunmu nodded and said, “Your words have reason! With that being the case, we will assist these islanders in getting rid of the snake.”

When they reached the Yamata river, they saw pitch black water and found it quite strange.

All the villages in the vicinity stayed away, no one wanting to have any contact with the snake.

After a while, there was movement in the river. Turbulent winds caused great waves on the surface of the river.

“It has arrived!” Li Yunmu said gloomily.

Peng!

A stream of water from the Yamata river charged into the sky, and an enormous snake with eight heads appeared in front of Li Yunmu and Miss An.

The instant Miss An saw the eight-headed snake, she was frightened out of her wits. The snake was so vicious that she could instantly tell that it was an ancient devil beast. The battle between her and the Kun had been extremely strenuous, so when faced with the eight-headed snake, she knew that she wasn’t its opponent.

Miss An patted Li Yunmu’s shoulder and said in deadly earnestness, “I will hand it over to you! You are the only hope of the islanders!”

“You don’t intend to fight it?” Li Yunmu rolled his eyes. “The villagers have such high expectations for you and you surprisingly intend to run away from the fight?”

“Who-who-who intends to flee? This is just a strategic retreat, you understand?”

When Miss An spoke, she felt a little bit guilty. After seeing Li Yunmu cast a disdainful gaze toward her, she instantly put on a brave front.

“You-you go first. I will follow behind you.”

While the two people were chatting, the eight-headed snake opened its mouth and began to talk. “You two are the offerings for this great snake today?”

She took a sniff, then suddenly frowned. “Which village’s offering are you? Why aren’t you a virgin male?”

When the eight-headed great snake looked at Li Yunmu, its eyes were filled with hostility. Clearly, the snake took great offense to the matter of Li Yunmu not being a virgin, which would influence the taste of its meal.

When its gaze fell on Miss An, it suddenly opened its bloody mouth wide and said, “But this virgin woman should be a delicacy!”

When the eight-headed great snake attacked Miss An with its mouth wide-open, Li Yunmu immediately chopped off one of its heads with his divine cyan blade.

Yet the next moment, the head regrew and attained its original size in the blink of an eye.

Miss An was quite shocked by the eight-headed great snake’s attack, but fortunately she was saved in time by Li Yunmu.

“You snake surprisingly dare to eat this Miss! This Miss will stake her all against you!”

Miss An lifted her long sword and rushed toward the eight-headed great snake. Since it wanted to eat her, she had to fight back.

“You even dare to eat this Miss, I see that you don’t want to live, snake.”

Li Yunmu and Miss An joined hands to deal with eight-headed great snake. They fought it in the air while the islanders underneath could see them clearly.

When the eight-headed great snake was suppressed by the two gods who descended from heaven, the people of Fusang tribe began to celebrate and applaud.

Hearing the cheers of villagers, Miss An and Li Yunmu’s moves became even more nimble and their speed increased greatly. Soon, the eight-headed great snake became unable to resist their attacks.

The villagers constantly cheered for them, because Miss An and Li Yunmu were their only hope to get rid of the calamity.

“Best of luck, gods!”

Li Yunmu suddenly passed the netherworld sword to Miss An and shouted, “Use this sword to chop off its head!”

Miss An took the netherworld sword, and for some reason, her strength began to merge with the weapon.

Could she have been approved by the netherworld sword? It had been obtained from the Dragon Silk Palace, and because of it, she had lost consciousness, which created a connection between her and the weapon.

Miss An brandished the netherworld sword!

One of the heads of the eight-headed great snake were instantly chopped off, and the snake groaned. “You aren’t this island’s people? Why are you assisting them? Even if you chop off my heads, they will regrow!”

Just when the eight-headed great snake began to feel complacent, its chopped off head was unable to regrow. The snake was startled, finding it impossible.

It had an inherent regenerative power, so how could it suddenly become unable to regrow its heads?

The divine cyan blade in Li Yunmu’s hand turned into a green snake and tightly locked the body of the eight-headed great snake.

Underneath, the islanders were looking at him and Miss An with astonished gazes, cheering them with all their hearts.

“Heavenly gods have succeeded! They subdued the eight-headed great snake!”

“The two heavenly gods are extremely ferocious! From now on, we will worship them as our Fusang tribe’s protector gods!”

“Long live Fusang! Long live heavenly gods!”

While the islanders got extremely excited, the eight-headed great snake suddenly said, “Do you think that chopping off my heads would exterminate me? Ha ha ha… too naive! I am undead! Undead!”

Upon hearing the words of the eight-headed great snake, Li Yunmu indifferently said, “Since you are unable to die, then we will seal you for eternity.”

At some point in time, a mirror had appeared in Li Yunmu’s hand. t It was given to him by the system, and its function was to seal all demonic beings in the world.

The eight-headed large snake who had been destroying people’s lives for years could finally be dealth with.

Li Yunmu caught the reflection of the eight-headed great snake in the mirror, and the snake instantly turned into a ball of black air. It was sucked into the mirror with a miserable shout, and the great snake could be seen on its surface.

Li Yunmu pulled back the mirror and coldly snorted. “There are many methods to deal with you without needing to kill you.”
